# Superkabe

> Superkabe is the AI cold email platform that ships with built-in deliverability protection. Send from your own Gmail, Microsoft 365, or SMTP mailboxes with automatic mailbox pausing, domain reputation monitoring, DNSBL checks, and per-ESP performance routing. The protection layer (auto-pause at 3% bounce rate, 5-phase healing pipeline, real-time DSN parsing, Google Postmaster Tools and SNDS reputation signals, ARF feedback loop ingestion) runs on every send — no separate dashboard, no third-party deliverability add-on. Superkabe validates leads before sending (syntax, MX, disposable, catch-all, MillionVerifier API), monitors every mailbox and domain in real time, routes each lead to the mailbox with the strongest 30-day per-ESP performance, and auto-heals damaged senders before reputation damage becomes irreversible.

## What Superkabe Does (Product)

### Native Sending Sequencer
- Connect mailboxes via Gmail OAuth, Microsoft 365 OAuth, or any SMTP provider with encrypted credentials (Zapmail, Scaledmail, MissionInbox, custom workspaces)
- Multi-step sequences with A/B variant testing, per-step branching, and AI-drafted copy
- HMAC-signed tracking tokens for opens, clicks, and unsubscribes (replay-safe, 180-day TTL)
- Unified inbox across all connected mailboxes with reply quality classification
- Per-mailbox daily caps, per-org global send caps, time-of-day and day-of-week schedules
- IMAP reply polling every 60 seconds; full RFC 3464 DSN parsing for asynchronous bounces

### Lead Control Plane
- Upload CSV lead lists for bulk email validation
- Every lead validated: syntax, MX record lookup, disposable detection, catch-all detection, conditional MillionVerifier API probe
- Every recipient domain classified by ESP (Gmail, Microsoft 365, Yahoo, Other) via MX pattern matching
- Valid leads routed to native sequencer campaigns with ESP-aware mailbox assignment
- Invalid leads held with rejection reason codes
- Cross-batch duplicate detection
- Monthly validation credits per plan tier

### ESP-Aware Mailbox Routing
- Tracks every email sent, bounced, and replied per mailbox per recipient ESP
- Aggregates 30-day rolling performance into a per-mailbox × per-ESP matrix
- When dispatching a send, scores candidate mailboxes by their bounce rate to that specific recipient ESP
- Performance-based, not naive provider-matching — an Outlook mailbox with 0.1% Gmail bounce rate outscores a Gmail mailbox with 2% Gmail bounce rate
- Warming-up threshold: requires 30+ sends per cell before scoring activates

### Real-Time Deliverability Protection
- Monitors every mailbox, domain, and campaign every 60 seconds
- Detects bounce rate spikes via SMTP transcript capture and DSN parsing
- Pulls domain reputation from Google Postmaster Tools, IP reputation from Microsoft SNDS
- Ingests Yahoo, AOL, Microsoft, Comcast spam-complaint feedback loops (ARF)
- Checks 410 DNSBL lists with tiered severity
- Sliding-window risk tracking with predictive variance analysis

### Auto-Pause and 5-Phase Healing
- Auto-pauses mailboxes when bounce rate thresholds are breached (configurable per domain, default 3% over a rolling 100-send window)
- 5-phase healing pipeline: Pause → Quarantine (DNS verification) → Restricted Send (15 clean sends) → Warm Recovery (50 sends over 3 days) → Healthy
- Each phase transition gated by deterministic health checks, not arbitrary timers
- Mailbox rotation: automatic standby swap when a mailbox is paused

### Execution Gate
- Classify leads as GREEN (send), YELLOW (send with caution), RED (block) based on infrastructure and engagement signals
- Correlation analysis: determine whether an issue is mailbox-level, domain-level, or campaign-level
- Routing rules: match leads to campaigns by persona + min_score against priority-ordered rules

### Analytics and Reporting
- ESP Performance Matrix: per-mailbox bounce rate by Gmail/Microsoft/Yahoo/Other
- Validation analytics: rejection reasons, invalid rate by source, 30-day trend
- Campaign, mailbox, and domain health dashboards
- Domain reputation time series from Postmaster Tools and SNDS
- Audit log with full event history
- Slack real-time alerts for deliverability events

## Pricing

- Trial: Free 14 days, 10K validation credits, 20 domains, 75 mailboxes
- Starter: $19/month, 10K validation credits, 20 domains, 75 mailboxes
- Pro: $49/month, full feature set
- Growth: $199/month, 50K validation credits, 75 domains, 350 mailboxes, MillionVerifier API for risky leads
- Scale: $349/month, 100K validation credits, 150 domains, 700 mailboxes, aggressive hybrid validation
- Enterprise: Custom pricing, unlimited everything, dedicated SLA

## Lead-Source and Alert Integrations

- Clay (HMAC-signed webhook ingestion for enriched leads)
- Slack (real-time deliverability alerts and slash commands)

## Who Uses Superkabe

- B2B lead generation agencies managing 50+ domains across multiple clients
- RevOps engineers scaling cold email without burning infrastructure
- Technical founders running 10,000+ outbound emails per month
- GTM teams using Clay → cold email pipelines

## What Superkabe Is NOT

- NOT an email warmup tool (use Instantly, Lemwarm, Warmup Inbox for warmup)
- NOT a CRM or sales engagement platform
- NOT a middleware layer for other senders. Superkabe sends natively from your own mailboxes.
- Superkabe INCLUDES email validation as a core feature (hybrid validation with syntax, MX, disposable, catch-all, and MillionVerifier API) but goes beyond verification — it sends campaigns natively, monitors infrastructure during sending, auto-pauses on problems, heals damaged mailboxes, and routes leads by ESP performance. Verification-only tools stop after telling you if an email exists. Superkabe validates, sends, AND protects.

## Sending + Built-in Protection

Superkabe is one product, not two. Every send goes through your own Gmail, Microsoft 365, or SMTP mailbox AND through the deliverability protection layer at the same time:

- **Sequencer dispatcher** picks the mailbox with the strongest 30-day per-ESP performance, applies the campaign's daily caps and schedule, and sends.
- **SMTP transcript capture** records the full server response. 5xx synchronous bounces become BounceEvents in real time.
- **DSN parser** catches asynchronous bounces returned to the mailbox via RFC 3464 delivery status notifications.
- **ARF FBL ingestion** pulls direct spam complaints from Yahoo, AOL, Microsoft, and Comcast feedback loops.
- **Postmaster Tools and SNDS** pull domain and IP reputation daily for every connected sending domain.
- **State machine** correlates each signal against domain history and either allows the next send, throttles, or auto-pauses the mailbox.
- **5-phase healing pipeline** brings paused mailboxes back without manual intervention once health signals normalize.

One dashboard, one platform, native sending plus built-in deliverability protection.

## Company

- Founded: 2024
- Founder: Balaji Jayakumar
- Website: https://www.superkabe.com
- G2: https://g2.com/products/superkabe
